title: L1: Add unchecked low-level call return value check
head: curry202504:feat/unchecked-call
body:
## Solutions

### New Files
- `src/checks/UncheckedCallCheck.sol` - unchecked call detection check
- `src/checks/ERC20ApprovalRaceCheck.sol` - ERC20 approve race condition check
- `src/examples/VulnerableUncheckedCall.sol` - vulnerable + fixed example contracts
- `test/UncheckedCallTest.t.sol` - Foundry tests proving the vulnerability

Closes #37
Closes #36
